name: HRY_SETUP_CONFIG_FEATURES_VL
query: SELECT tab.FEATURE_ID ,tab.BASE_FEATURE_NAME ,tab.CREATED_BY ,tab.CREATION_DATE ,tab.LAST_UPDATED_BY ,tab.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,tab.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN ,tab.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER ,tab.MODULE_ID ,tab.SEED_DATA_SOURCE ,tab.ENTERPRISE_ID ,tab.SGUID ,tl.FEATURE_NAME ,tl.FEATURE_DESCRIPTION ,tl.LANGUAGE ,tl.SOURCE_LANG FROM hry_setup_config_features_tl tl, hry_setup_config_features tab WHERE tab.FEATURE_ID = tl.FEATURE_ID AND tl.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
